vocab.components: Standalone components with signals. OnPush change detection for performance. inject() function instead of constructor injection.
vocab.api: HttpClient with typed observables. Interceptors for auth headers. takeUntilDestroyed() for automatic cleanup.
vocab.forms: Reactive forms with FormBuilder. signal-based form controls in Angular 17+. AsyncValidators for server-side checks.
vocab.routing: RouterLink directive. Route guards with canActivate functional guards. Lazy-loaded routes with loadComponent.
